title: Fix graph dependency order for Std injection

source.subject: Fix graph dependency order test for Std injection

body:
Fixes dependency graph ordering so implicit **Std** injection is stable in module graph tests.

- **Completed:** 2026-04-09

## Relation
Part of **v01-compiler-parity** analysis/graph stability.
